dawn-veil.seen: A translucent, glowing-veined blossom and its dried seed-head companion float in a pale mist of negative space, the flower's amber threads catching light like embers under gauze.
dawn-veil.reason: The luminous, softly bleeding rendering and the vast cream void around a single stem embody the canon's restraint and dream-wash light, and the whisper's gentle dawn-arrival is felt in how the glow sits inside the petals rather than striking them.

alpine-scatter.seen: A sparse cluster of small mountain wildflowers on tall thin stems, scattered against a vast pale, fog-white void.
alpine-scatter.reason: The generous negative space against the two-thirds empty sky and the soft, memory-like haze of the background genuinely earn the whisper about smallness feeling complete in thin air, and the composition sits comfortably in Room I's minimalist canon.

solar-silk.seen: Backlit tulip-like blooms dissolve into a golden haze, their translucent petals veined like silk holding sunlight rather than reflecting it.
solar-silk.reason: The light genuinely softens as it passes through the petals — the whisper is literalized in the translucency and glow, and the dense floral crowding still cedes a real breathing void at center-top, so restraint and alchemy both hold, though the bottom-heavy composition crowds the negative space more than ideal.

porcelain-garden.seen: A single blue five-petaled bloom held aloft in luminous white, two smaller drooping blossoms trailing beneath like whispered echoes, the whole stem dissolving into a soft indigo mist.
porcelain-garden.reason: The veined petals and fine golden stamens carry real botanical presence while the negative space and bleeding blue-into-white haze embody the room's stillness and grace without a single note of noise or artifice.

highland-weave.seen: A field of cosmos blooms on slender stems, each flower distinct yet all leaning into the same misted breath of sage and cream.
highland-weave.reason: The many-small-lives whisper is genuinely held — no single bloom dominates, the multitude reads as a chorus, and the dream-wash fog keeps edges dissolving true to canon, though the composition thins toward the upper-right corner.

verdant-memory.seen: Two pale, moth-soft blooms surface out of near-total darkness, cradled by clover-green leaves that hold light like something half-recalled.
verdant-memory.reason: The deep shadow-to-glow gradient and dissolving petal edges enact the whisper directly — memory as something the eye has to work to retrieve from green dark — and nothing here reads as synthetic or structurally off.

sun-faded-herbarium.seen: A pressed-herbarium arrangement of blooms and leaves rendered in bleached sepia, gold, and faded lavender, laid flat as specimens on aged paper.
sun-faded-herbarium.reason: The composition breathes with restraint and negative space, and the desaturated, sun-bleached palette embodies the whisper of time passing gently, with only a faint softness at petal edges to place it in Dream-Wash rather than crisp illustration.

aether-glass-refined.seen: Translucent ginkgo-fan petals rendered as veined glass, caught mid-bloom in a pale sage haze of soft bokeh light.
aether-glass-refined.reason: The fibrous vein-lines and glassy sheen genuinely read as matter unsure whether it's still solid, and the desaturated green-white palette with dissolving edges honors both the Alchemical Atmosphere and Dream-Wash canon without tipping into obvious AI over-symmetry.

opaline-drift.seen: A single bloom dissolved almost to vapor against warm greige, its stem the only line the image commits to.
opaline-drift.reason: It passes because the whisper is literal — nothing here insists on being seen, yet the flower's circular gesture and stem still cohere into recognizable presence rather than mere fog.

ether-glass.seen: A translucent, glass-thin flower and its distant echo drift in vast white silence, tethered by curling tendril-wires as if caught mid-vanish.
ether-glass.reason: The near-transparency of the petals, the immense negative space, and the fragile wire-line stems enact the whisper exactly — this is a bloom that seems to dissolve if you blink, glass and memory rendered as one gesture.

luminous-void.seen: Two faint wireframe blossoms — one tall and open, one small and budding — barely etched into near-total black.
luminous-void.reason: It genuinely risks vanishing yet the linework holds just enough structure and a soft halo of light around the taller bloom to keep presence intact, honoring both the whisper and the canon of restraint.

labradorite-veil.seen: Three near-black bloom-forms emerge from shadow, their petal-edges catching thin iridescent glints like labradorite flash seen only at an angle.
labradorite-veil.reason: The near-total darkness withholds itself exactly as the whisper demands, and the schiller-edge lighting rewards the eye that leans in rather than illuminating for free, though the petal surfaces read slightly muddy/painterly rather than mineral-taut.

amethyst-bloom.seen: A single lavender bloom whose petals fray into soft, uneven paper-edges around a dense violet-black throat that pulls the eye inward and holds it.
amethyst-bloom.reason: The bruised gravity at the center gives real mineral depth and the whisper's quiet settling, and the frayed silhouette against void-plum ground keeps the negative space doing its restrained work, so nothing breaks the spell despite a slightly flat overall lighting.

frost-lattice.seen: A crystalline, radially-symmetric bloom of frosted glass-petals fanning from a starburst center, veined like translucent ice.
frost-lattice.reason: The mineral-frost transformation and dream-wash edge-bleed both hold, and the fractal petal symmetry earns the 'delicate precision' whisper without tipping into artificial stiffness.

iridescent-ash.seen: A ghost-pale floral stem, ash-grey and diagonal, holding one bright bead of iridescent light at its center like an ember refusing to go out.
iridescent-ash.reason: The near-total desaturation into ash-fog reads as the aftermath of burning, and the single glinting highlight at the flower's heart earns the whisper of something luminous surviving — restraint, dissolve, and mineral atmosphere all present with no artifacts breaking the spell.

deepwater-bloom.seen: A single pale bud curls at the tip of one strand among dark drifting eelgrass, caught mid-gesture in still water.
deepwater-bloom.reason: The curl of that one lit strand against the near-black depth reads as motion held in stillness, exactly the whisper's claim, and the dream-wash bloom of light and soft-edged strands sits comfortably inside Room V's alchemical, deep-and-wild register.

midnight-opaline.seen: Opalescent petals of blush and violet catch light against near-black petals and a starfield of scattered glinting particulate, exactly as if color were hiding until the angle shifts.
midnight-opaline.reason: It carries its whisper faithfully — the iridescent shimmer against void-black reads as color asleep in darkness — though the edges are drawn with slightly harder linework than the dream-wash canon prefers.

ember-bloom.seen: A rose smoldering down into embers, its petals gone the color of banked coals while a thin ember-line traces each edge in restrained heat.
ember-bloom.reason: The whisper's promise — warmth after the fire has learned restraint — is genuinely held in the glowing outline against near-black petals, and it sings with Room V's alchemical, dream-washed canon without breaking the spell.

wild-tangle.seen: A dense skein of blue and gold wildflowers and grasses spilling and crossing in unruly diagonals against a bleached-white ground, refusing the tidy bouquet.
wild-tangle.reason: The tangle genuinely resists arrangement — stems cross at odd angles, blooms cluster and thin unevenly, and the dream-wash bleed at the edges keeps it soft rather than botanical-illustration stiff, so whisper and canon both hold.

ink-garden.seen: A single continuous ink line traces a stem into translucent, sumi-e blossoms — bleeding gray-black petals with one warm ochre bloom breathing at the center, held on a vast field of white.
ink-garden.reason: The line reads as one unbroken gesture, the wash-bled petal edges genuinely dissolve into memory rather than render, and the restraint of white space lets the ink's single moment stay — it fulfills Room VI's hand-and-mark whisper and both the botanical-minimalism and dream-wash canons at once.

charcoal-whisper.seen: Thread-fine charcoal contours of trailing floral stems and blossoms, drawn as if the ink itself is fading mid-gesture, with soft ash-grey bleed pooling behind the linework.
charcoal-whisper.reason: The wire-thin, half-erased quality of the line against the smoky washes reads exactly as a mark left after the hand and voice have withdrawn, and it sits comfortably inside both the botanical-minimalism and alchemical-ash registers of the collection.

nocturne-bloom.seen: A luminous night-blooming flower opening in starlit dark, its petals glowing faintly from within as if lit by memory rather than sun.
nocturne-bloom.reason: It genuinely earns the whisper — this reads as a bloom occurring after the world has quieted, and the dream-wash edge-softening and star-dusted atmosphere serve Alchemical Atmosphere and Dream-Wash Rendering, though the crowded, almost-symmetrical petal mass leans fuller and busier than the collection's minimalist restraint.
